name: Generic Website
description: Starter tool set for any website — search content, get page info, submit forms, and navigate between pages.
author: WebMCP

tools.name: search
tools.description: Search the website content. Returns matching pages with titles, URLs, and relevant excerpts.

limit.description: Maximum number of results to return

tools.name: get_page_info
tools.description: Get structured information about a specific page — title, description, headings, main content, and metadata.

path.description: Page path relative to the site root (e.g. "/about", "/products/widget")

tools.name: submit_form
tools.description: Submit a form on the website (e.g. contact form, newsletter signup). Input fields depend on the form.

formId.description: Identifier of the form to submit (e.g. "contact", "newsletter")

fields.description: Key-value pairs of form field names and values

tools.name: list_pages
tools.description: List all available pages and their descriptions. Useful for site navigation and discovery.
